title: Cyathea ivohibensis
taxonomy: Cyathea ivohibensis is a species of tree fern. It belongs to the family Cyatheaceae. This classification is further divided into the order Cyatheales, the class Polypodiopsida, and the division Pteridophyta. This fern is native to the island of Madagascar and is known for its unique characteristics. Cyathea ivohibensis is a relatively rare species and is considered endangered due to habitat loss and other environmental factors.
